text: Add GitHub URL — FOC repo & 6-DOF arm code are high-value for embedded roles (Settings → Social links)
Confirm expected graduation date, June 2027? (Résumé tab → education)
Add relevant coursework list beyond ECE 118 (Résumé tab → education details)
Confirm official Boncu-Space title (Résumé tab → experience)
Finish ECE 118 combat robot writeup — drivetrain, state machine, competition results (Projects + Papers)
Expand HARE Lab bullets — which subsystems did you own? (Résumé tab)
Add 6-DOF arm metrics — cost, payload, repeatability (Projects)
Upload a tailored résumé PDF (Settings → Résumé PDF)
Replace the sample STL with real Onshape exports or embed links (Models tab + project CAD fields)
Set the production site URL after deploying (Settings → Site URL)
